name: Paladin Quantique
description: L'infanterie renforcée la plus lourde du Chœur. Son armure quantique déphase localement la réalité, le rendant semi-intangible pendant les charges. Chaque pas est un calcul de destruction.
prompt: Grimdark sci-fi, massive humanoid robot paladin in full quantum-shifting heavy armor that distorts the air around it, reinforced white ceramic and bronze plating, tattered dark robes billowing with energy, faceless smooth mask, holding a crackling two-handed electrified staff, golden holographic equations phasing in and out of reality, cyber-asceticism, unstoppable force, cinematic lighting, highly detailed
